hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-inter uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#3A5A40]

components.navbar: Solid bg-[#FAF7F2] or blur with border-b border-[#3A5A40]/10. Do not use fully transparent nav over hero images.

buttons.primary: bg-[#3A5A40] text-white hover:bg-[#2c4430] rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors font-inter flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#3A5A40] text-[#3A5A40] hover:bg-[#3A5A40] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors font-inter flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#1DA851] rounded-none px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full mt-4 font-inter font-medium transition-colors

components.product_card: Premium editorial look. NO border. Image has aspect ratio 3:4 or 4:5 with object-cover. Title below image in Playfair Display. WhatsApp CTA button at bottom. Avoid generic e-commerce boxes.
components.section_story: Asymmetrical layout using the Tetris grid mode. For example, image spans 7 columns, text spans 5 columns.
components.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Serif text, low contrast (e.g. text-[#3A5A40]/20), very slow drift for an editorial ribbon feel.

hero.description: Lush mango tree branches. Perfect for Hero background with black/30 overlay to ensure Playfair text pops.

mango_harvest.description: Basket of fresh harvest for Mango/Litchi cards
Basket of yellow/green fruit for Mango cards

village_pantry.description: Rustic wooden bowl, use for Sattu or Dals
Clay pot cooking, use for Desi Ghee

festive_foods.description: Plate of treats/sweets, use for Thekua/Tilkut
Jaggery processing, use for Jaggery blocks/sweets

story_and_subscription.description: Indian village portrait, for 'Why Mitti Basket Exists' section
Rustic wooden box of produce for Weekly Farm Baskets Launching This July

sections: Hero: Headline 'From India's Mitti to Your Home', Subtext, Shop Mango Harvest CTA, Waitlist CTA.
Summer Harvest Drop: Showcase Mangoes, Litchi, Makhana.
Village Pantry Essentials: Ghee, Jaggery, Sattu, Dals.
Heritage Festive Foods: Thekua, Tilkut, Khajur.
Brand Story: 'Why Mitti Basket Exists' with rural farmer image.
Subscription Preview: 'Weekly Farm Baskets' using subscription box image.
How Mitti Basket Works: 3-step minimal editorial layout.
Trust / Testimonial: Large typography quote, elegant.
Scarcity Positioning: Minimal callout banner 'We Deliver Only What's Harvested Fresh Each Week'.
Footer: Large typography, soft charcoal background or primary green.

Farm Basket Subscription.description: Waitlist page for subscription boxes. Focus on the subscription image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use WhatsApp links for ordering formatted as: 'https://wa.me/8107722137?text=Hi,%20I%20would%20like%20to%20order...'. There is NO cart/checkout.
Install lucide-react or react-icons for WhatsApp and standard icons.

Implement product displays avoiding boring symmetric marketplace grids. Use a Tetris bento grid (e.g., span 2 for feature product, span 1 for others) or a horizontal scroll to feel like a high-end editorial gallery.
Ensure 'Inter' and 'Playfair Display' fonts are loaded via Google Fonts in index.html.
Include 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements (buttons, links).
Delivery is Bangalore only. Mention this minimally but clearly on the site.
